appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md: F1→Ctrl+Tab references (2 places), background surface description (solid→radial gradient), font pipeline (2x→6x subpixel, stem darkening, 20px, GPOS kerning), GlyphCache size (~430KiB→~1.3MiB), shared buffer layout (1→2 SVG icons), palette count (13→14), removed status bar references from font pipeline, added init→compositor message ordering invariant
appliedUpdates.sourceFeature: ctrl-tab-switch, background-gradient, subpixel-rendering, stem-darkening, font-metrics-and-sizing, remove-status-bar, title-bar-redesign, rtc-clock

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update IPC message type allocation ranges. Current text says 'Types 1-7 = config messages, 8 = MSG_GPU_READY'. Reality is now types 1-15 for config/setup messages (including 9=IMG_ICON_CONFIG, 15=RTC_CONFIG). Suggest: 'Types 1-15 = config/setup messages, 20 = MSG_PRESENT, 30-39 = editor messages'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features title-bar-redesign (MSG_IMG_ICON_CONFIG=9) and rtc-clock (MSG_RTC_CONFIG=15) both allocated message types outside the documented 1-7 range. Compositor main.rs confirms types 3,6,7,9,15 as config messages.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update compositor surfaces heading from '(current: 6, target: fewer after status bar removal)' to '(current: 4 surfaces)' since status bar removal is complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature remove-status-bar (commit f5bdfd0) reduced surfaces from 6 to 4. AGENTS.md heading is stale.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Extend the 'When changing a constant value' convention to cover feature/concept removal: 'When removing a feature or concept, search for ALL references (code, comments, docstrings, documentation) to the removed concept and update or remove them.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature remove-status-bar left 4 stale 'status bar' comment references in compositor/main.rs. The existing convention only covers constant value changes, not feature removals.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about font metrics: 'When specifying kerning implementation, check which mechanism the target font actually uses (kern table vs GPOS) before specifying the approach in feature descriptions.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature font-metrics-and-sizing specified 'kern table format 0' but Nunito Sans only has GPOS kerning. Worker correctly adapted but the feature description was misleading.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md convention about constant references not fully followed (stale GlyphCache docstrings in lib.rs)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a code-level issue already captured as a non-blocking review finding in subpixel-rendering review, not a shared state update

rejectedObservations.observation: os-worker skill should mention heap-allocating GlyphCache in tests when OVERSAMPLE_X increases
rejectedObservations.reason: Too narrow and implementation-specific for a general skill procedure. The existing stack constraint guidance in AGENTS.md ('Stack budget: Userspace processes have 16 KiB stack. Large structures >1 KiB must be heap-allocated') already covers this principle.

rejectedObservations.observation: Premature comment edit in monochrome-palette dropping status bar reference before it was removed
rejectedObservations.reason: Already resolved by subsequent commit (f5bdfd0). No ongoing issue.
